work_unit: PD-H003 audit-log instrumentation for poll-build.js + poll-pre-check.js (audit-2026-07-03-013 derived fix, priority 7, direction-shift)
situation: audit-2026-07-03-013 finding PD-H003: poll-build.js and poll-pre-check.js had zero audit-log despite being pipeline-trigger / compliance-check sensitive paths (DO B violation). Every poll cycle was invisible to audit trail. Derived from deep audit of skills/prod-deploy module.
action: Added 'pipeline-poll' and 'precheck-poll' ACTION_MAP keys to audit-log-helper.js; instrumented both pollers with writeAuditLog calls in success/failure/outer-catch paths. Result field reflects actual outcome (success on clean poll, failure on updateEvent error or outer catch), never constant-success. cp-guard initially skipped helper (diverged from prior PD-M002 unmerged commit); manually merged both keys into worktree and amended commit.
outcome_evidence: Commit e5e5b4f on auto/opt-prod-deploy-1782970212 (amended after cp-guard merge), pushed to origin. node --check passed for all 3 files. ACTION_MAP now contains pipeline-poll (pipeline_trigger/high) + precheck-poll (compliance_check/medium). Both pollers call writeAuditLog in try/finally + outer catch with real result semantics.
next_suggestion: Next pending derived fix: PD-M001 (priority 8, route-fix) — http-base.js L28-36 dual credential env coexistence silent; CODE_PRIVATE_TOKEN wins without warning. Add stderr WARN when both env vars set.

audit_findings.finding: ACTION_MAP missing pipeline-poll and precheck-poll keys; poll-build.js and poll-pre-check.js had no audit-log callsite at all (DO B violation for pipeline-trigger and compliance-check sensitive paths).
audit_findings.remediation: Added two ACTION_MAP entries + instrumented both pollers with writeAuditLog in success/failure/outer-catch paths. Result reflects actual outcome, never constant-success.
